ms.description: Monotonic time since boot or controller startup.

sp_raw.description: raw incoming pressure setpoint currently held by the profile engine

sp_flt.description: filtered pressure setpoint actually used internally by the controller

sp_recipe.description: visual recipe reference; ideal profile target for display/comparison

sp_ctrl.description: control reference after internal conditioning; command seen by control logic

ctrl_out.description: final controller output command in percent

coffee_flow.description: estimated outflow through puck / coffee flow

u_raw.description: pressure branch output after clamp and before final slew limiter

u_applied.description: pressure branch output after final slew limiter

limiter_active_up.description: 1 when rise slew limiter is active

limiter_active_down.description: 1 when drop slew limiter is active

error_integral.description: integral state of legacy pressure controller

u_clamped_raw.description: controller output after 0..100 clamp and before slew limiter

clamp_active_high.description: 1 when output was clipped by upper clamp

clamp_active_low.description: 1 when output was clipped by lower clamp

u_ff_dyn_raw.description: No description captured for this channel.

ff_pressure_w.description: No description captured for this channel.

ff_above_w.description: No description captured for this channel.

ff_gamma.description: No description captured for this channel.

ramp_hold_active.description: No description captured for this channel.

drop_rate_active.description: No description captured for this channel.

mpc_shadow_enabled.description: 1 when shadow MPC is being computed in parallel

mpc_u_shadow.description: total output suggested by shadow MPC; not applied to actuator in shadow stage

mpc_u_ss.description: steady-state component suggested by shadow MPC

mpc_u_trim.description: corrective trim component suggested by shadow MPC

mpc_p1_pred.description: one-step pressure prediction from shadow MPC model

mpc_pn_pred.description: terminal pressure prediction at end of shadow MPC horizon

mpc_qout_est.description: estimated outflow / load used by shadow MPC model

mpc_qout_raw.description: No description captured for this channel.

mpc_residual.description: measured minus predicted pressure residual for shadow MPC

mpc_residual_bias.description: No description captured for this channel.

power_cmd.description: floating-point power command sent to pump stage before integer quantization

power_psm_quantized.description: integer power actually sent to PSM

power_quant_residual.description: sigma-delta residual kept for next quantization step

notes.u_ff_dyn_raw: raw dynamic feedforward request before FF-path LPF and slew limiting
notes.ff_pressure_w: pressure-window weight applied to dynamic FF
notes.ff_above_w: above-target suppression weight applied to dynamic FF
notes.ff_gamma: ramp-dependent gamma multiplier applied to dynamic FF
notes.ramp_hold_active: 1 when the downstream drop-rate hold is active during ramp-up
notes.drop_rate_active: active downstream output drop-rate cap in percent per second
notes.mpc_qout_raw: instantaneous outflow / load estimate before shadow-MPC LPF
notes.mpc_residual_bias: low-pass residual bias term added to shadow predictions
